name: @elizaos/plugin-coding-tools
description: Native Claude-Code-style coding tools (Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob, etc.) for the Eliza agent.
author: elizaOS

scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test

CODING_TOOLS_WORKSPACE_ROOTS.description: Comma-separated absolute paths the coding tools may read/write under. Defaults to the runtime's process.cwd() when unset.

CODING_TOOLS_DENY_COMMANDS.description: Comma-separated command-prefix patterns the BASH action must refuse (e.g. 'rm -rf /,sudo,curl|wget'). Combined with built-in denylist.

CODING_TOOLS_BASH_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Default BASH timeout in milliseconds. Hard ceiling enforced before backgrounding kicks in.

CODING_TOOLS_BASH_BG_BUDGET_MS.description: Foreground budget. Bash invocations exceeding this auto-background and return a task_id (matches Claude's 15s ASSISTANT_BLOCKING_BUDGET_MS).

CODING_TOOLS_MAX_READ_LINES.description: Max lines returned by READ in a single call before truncation. Mirrors Claude's MAX_LINES_TO_READ.

CODING_TOOLS_MAX_FILE_SIZE_BYTES.description: Pre-stat byte cap on READ. Files larger than this are rejected with a message instructing the agent to read in chunks.

CODING_TOOLS_GREP_HEAD_LIMIT.description: Default head_limit for GREP. Set to 0 to disable.
